sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110786" key="fikotu/xh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φικοτύχη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n110786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φυκοτύχη</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.59</biblScope></bibl>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
